name.zh: PCS 疼痛灾难化量表

description.zh: 评估疼痛相关灾难化思维三个维度的13题量表
description.en: A 13-item scale measuring three dimensions of pain-related catastrophic thinking

name.zh: CORE-10 临床结果常规评估
name.en: CORE-10 Clinical Outcomes in Routine Evaluation

description.zh: 评估心理困扰总体水平的10题临床常规监测量表
description.en: A 10-item clinical routine monitoring scale for overall psychological distress

name.zh: AHS 成人希望感量表

description.zh: 评估路径思维和动力思维两个希望感维度的12题量表
description.en: A 12-item scale measuring Pathways and Agency dimensions of hope

name.zh: WLEIS 情商量表

description.zh: 评估情绪智力四个维度的16题量表
description.en: A 16-item scale measuring four dimensions of emotional intelligence

name.zh: BPAQ-SF 攻击性问卷简版

description.zh: 评估身体攻击、言语攻击、愤怒和敌意四个维度的12题量表
description.en: A 12-item scale measuring Physical Aggression, Verbal Aggression, Anger, and Hostility

name.zh: WI 怀特利指数

description.zh: 评估健康焦虑（疑病症）严重程度的14题经典量表
description.en: A 14-item classic scale measuring health anxiety (hypochondriasis) severity

name.zh: SHS 主观幸福感量表

description.zh: 测量个体整体主观幸福感水平的4题简短量表
description.en: A 4-item brief scale measuring overall subjective happiness

name.zh: SIAS 社交互动焦虑量表

description.zh: 评估社交互动情境中焦虑水平的20题量表
description.en: A 20-item scale assessing anxiety in social interaction situations

name.zh: CES-D-10 流调中心抑郁量表简版

description.zh: 快速筛查抑郁症状的10题简版量表
description.en: A 10-item short form for rapid screening of depressive symptoms

name.zh: PC-PTSD-5 初级保健PTSD筛查量表

description.zh: 用于初级保健环境中快速筛查PTSD的5题问卷
description.en: A 5-item screening tool for identifying probable PTSD in primary care settings

name.zh: SSOSH 求助自我污名量表
name.en: SSOSH Self-Stigma of Seeking Help Scale

description.zh: 评估与寻求心理帮助相关的自我污名的10题量表
description.en: A 10-item scale measuring self-stigma associated with seeking psychological help

name.zh: DERS-16 情绪调节困难量表简版
name.en: DERS-16 Difficulties in Emotion Regulation Scale

description.zh: 从五个维度评估情绪调节困难的16题简版量表
description.en: A 16-item brief scale assessing emotion regulation difficulties across five dimensions

name.zh: BRCS 简短心理弹性应对量表

description.zh: 评估适应性应对压力能力的4题简短量表
description.en: A 4-item brief scale measuring resilient coping tendencies

name.zh: EDE-QS 进食障碍检查问卷简版
name.en: EDE-QS Eating Disorder Examination Questionnaire Short

description.zh: 评估进食障碍心理病理的12题简版问卷
description.en: A 12-item short form assessing eating disorder psychopathology

name.zh: STAI-6 状态焦虑量表简版
name.en: STAI-6 State Anxiety Inventory Short Form

description.zh: 快速评估当前焦虑状态的6题简版量表
description.en: A 6-item short form for rapid assessment of current state anxiety

name.zh: IUS-12 无法忍受不确定性量表简版
name.en: IUS-12 Intolerance of Uncertainty Scale Short Form

description.zh: 评估对不确定性容忍程度的12题简版量表
description.en: A 12-item short form measuring intolerance of uncertainty

name.zh: RPA 积极情感反应量表
name.en: RPA Responses to Positive Affect Scale

description.zh: 评估个体在体验积极情绪时反应方式的17题量表
description.en: A 17-item scale measuring response styles when experiencing positive emotions

name.zh: WHODAS 2.0 世卫组织残疾评定量表

description.zh: 评估六个领域健康相关残疾程度的12题量表
description.en: A 12-item scale assessing health-related disability across six domains

name.zh: CAGE-AID 药物滥用筛查问卷

description.zh: 在经典CAGE问卷基础上改编的4题筛查工具，同时涵盖酒精和药物使用问题
description.en: A 4-item screening tool adapted from the CAGE questionnaire to include both alcohol and drug use

name.zh: CD-RISC-10 心理弹性量表

description.zh: 评估个体应对压力、逆境和变化能力的10题心理弹性量表
description.en: A 10-item scale measuring the ability to cope with stress, adversity, and change

name.zh: CFS 查德尔疲劳量表

description.zh: 测量躯体疲劳和精神疲劳严重程度的11题问卷
description.en: An 11-item questionnaire measuring the severity of physical and mental fatigue

name.zh: DBAS-16 睡眠功能失调信念和态度量表

description.zh: 评估与睡眠相关的功能失调信念、态度和期望的16题量表
description.en: A 16-item scale assessing dysfunctional beliefs, attitudes, and expectations about sleep

name.zh: DTS 痛苦忍受量表

description.zh: 评估个体感知的忍受情绪痛苦能力的15题量表
description.en: A 15-item scale assessing perceived ability to tolerate emotional distress

name.zh: ESSI 社会支持简评量表

description.zh: 评估个体感知到的社会支持水平的6题简短量表
description.en: A 6-item brief measure of perceived social support availability

name.zh: FMI-14 弗莱堡正念量表

description.zh: 测量日常生活中当下觉察和非评判态度的14题正念量表
description.en: A 14-item scale measuring mindfulness as present-moment awareness and non-judgment in daily life

name.zh: FoMO 错失恐惧量表
name.en: FoMO Fear of Missing Out Scale

description.zh: 评估对错过他人有价值体验的普遍性担忧的10题量表
description.en: A 10-item scale measuring the pervasive apprehension of missing out on rewarding experiences

name.zh: PHQ-8 患者健康问卷8项版

description.zh: 不含自杀意念条目的8题抑郁症状自评量表，适用于一般人群研究
description.en: An 8-item depression measure identical to PHQ-9 without the suicidality item, suitable for population studies

name.zh: RS-14 心理弹性量表

description.zh: 评估自我依赖、意义感、坚持不懈等积极人格特质的14题心理弹性量表
description.en: A 14-item resilience scale assessing self-reliance, meaning, perseverance, and equanimity

name.zh: SBQ-R 自杀行为问卷修订版

description.zh: 评估终生自杀意念、近期频率、威胁和未来可能性的4题筛查工具
description.en: A 4-item screening tool assessing lifetime suicidal ideation, recent frequency, threats, and future likelihood

name.zh: SCS-13 自我控制量表简版

description.zh: 测量个体在自我控制方面差异的13题量表，评估抑制冲动和改变行为的能力
description.en: A 13-item scale measuring individual differences in self-control and impulse regulation

name.zh: SPANE 积极与消极体验量表
name.en: SPANE Scale of Positive and Negative Experience

description.zh: 评估过去四周积极和消极情绪体验的12题主观幸福感量表
description.en: A 12-item subjective well-being measure assessing positive and negative feelings over the past four weeks

name.zh: SWEMWBS 华威爱丁堡心理幸福感量表简版
name.en: SWEMWBS Short Warwick-Edinburgh Mental Well-Being Scale

description.zh: 侧重心理功能评估的7题心理幸福感简版量表
description.en: A 7-item short scale measuring mental well-being with a focus on psychological functioning

name.zh: ASI-3 焦虑敏感性指数

description.zh: 评估身体、认知和社会三个维度焦虑敏感性的18题量表
description.en: An 18-item scale measuring anxiety sensitivity across physical, cognitive, and social dimensions

name.zh: BFNE-S 简版负面评价恐惧量表
name.en: BFNE-S Brief Fear of Negative Evaluation Scale

description.zh: 评估社交情境中对负面评价恐惧程度的8题量表
description.en: An 8-item scale measuring fear of negative evaluation in social situations

name.zh: Brief-COPE 简明应对方式问卷

description.zh: 评估14种应对策略的28题量表
description.en: A 28-item scale measuring 14 coping strategies

name.zh: CFQ 认知失败问卷

description.zh: 评估日常认知失误频率的25题量表
description.en: A 25-item questionnaire measuring frequency of everyday cognitive failures

name.zh: HADS 医院焦虑抑郁量表
name.en: HADS Hospital Anxiety and Depression Scale

description.zh: 在综合医院环境中同时评估焦虑和抑郁的14题量表
description.en: A 14-item scale measuring anxiety and depression in general hospital settings

name.zh: IES-6 事件影响量表-6

description.zh: 快速评估创伤事件心理影响的6题简版量表
description.en: A 6-item brief scale for rapid assessment of psychological impact of traumatic events

name.zh: LSNS-6 Lubben社会网络量表

description.zh: 评估家庭和朋友社会网络规模的6题量表
description.en: A 6-item scale measuring family and friends social network size

name.zh: PRMQ 前瞻性与回溯性记忆问卷
name.en: PRMQ Prospective and Retrospective Memory Questionnaire

description.zh: 评估前瞻性记忆和回溯性记忆问题的16题量表
description.en: A 16-item scale measuring prospective and retrospective memory problems

name.zh: PSAS 睡前唤醒量表

description.zh: 评估睡前认知和躯体唤醒水平的16题量表
description.en: A 16-item scale measuring cognitive and somatic pre-sleep arousal

name.zh: PWI 个人幸福指数

description.zh: 评估七个生活领域满意度的幸福感量表
description.en: A 7-item scale measuring satisfaction across seven life domains

name.zh: SOC-13 心理一致感量表

description.zh: 评估可理解感、可管理感和有意义感三个维度的13题量表
description.en: A 13-item scale measuring comprehensibility, manageability, and meaningfulness
